name: Pasta and Fagioli
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces cannellini beans (or other similar canned beans)
1/2 cup water or more as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, seed, and dice the tomatoes, or use 1 16-ounce can of plum tomatoes (drained).
2. Rinse and drain the beans.
3. Heat olive oil in a large skillet or heavy casserole dish over low heat.
4. Sauté onions and garlic for about 8 to 10 minutes until onions are soft and translucent.
5. Add tomatoes, oregano, thyme, rosemary, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
6. Simmer the sauce for about 10 minutes until it thickens and becomes hot.
7. Stir in the beans and water (or more liquid as needed), then cook for an additional 5 to 8 minutes until heated through.
8. Add the cooked pasta and chopped parsley, stir well.
9. Drizzle with balsamic vinegar before serving.
10. Serve each portion on four plates, topped with a sprinkle of Parmesan cheese.
Each serving contains approximately 330 calories, 4 milligrams of cholesterol, 6 grams of fat, and 610 milligrams of sodium.
